figures.caption: Fig. 1. Overview of the proposed rule-based skill injection framework, illustrating the pipeline from synthetic training data generation to skill transfer on novel geometric paths.

Fig. 2. Predicted vs. actual parameter values on the test set. Each subplot shows one geometry type: L-shape straight (top-left), L-shape corner (topright), window straight (bottom-left), window corner (bottom-right). Blue circles: velocity scaling factor; orange triangles: orientation offset (rad). The red dashed line indicates perfect prediction.
